phase4_final_decision: Option A - hard revert 59b70ca per user approval. Production pipeline = post-Phase-3 state.

phase4_result.cascade_grade_reality: catastrophically broken — 3 pages have placeholder comments instead of nav/footer, class="components/footer.html" file-path-as-class-value, dozens of HTML classes reference undefined CSS rules
phase4_result.per_task_review_verdicts: all tasks got REVISE verdicts with scores 34-71 in iterative_review cycles
root_causes: allowlist builder generates classes from design tokens but nothing wires them to Tailwind config or CSS
rewriter regresses when forced to fix (71.5 -> 39.5 on about_html)
devstral reviewer graded broken output as A (same class of blind spot as mistral on @media var())
hybrid cached blueprint has vanilla prose + Tailwind tech_stack, confusing the model
phase4_result.infrastructure_status: scaffolding is sound (227 tests pass, allowlist builder runs, verification branch fires, Tailwind CLI installs). Only the ALLOWLIST DESIGN and prompt-mode interaction are broken.
phase4_result.recommendation: Option A - hard revert commit 59b70ca. RI-1 needs v2 redesign (real Tailwind utilities or theme mapping). Wave 2 project.

phase4_node_install: v20.19.2 on both laptop (.npm-global/bin) and elostirion (/usr/local/bin)

phase3_result.nav_variance_proof: byte-identical nav.html graded B in run_1 and D in run_2 (diff empty)

target_bugs_fixed.no_var_in_media: YES — CSS media queries use literal values
target_bugs_fixed.fragment_is_document: YES — nav.html is a proper fragment

phase2_result.regression_interpretation: Three C-grade files are flagged for inline styles/duplication (pre-existing code smells) that reviewer is now seeing more clearly. Not caused by RI-5's rule fires.
phase2_result.recommendation: KEEP SHIPPED, second-combo validation as follow-up

phase2_gateway_wiring: DEFERRED — Cold_Anvil side captures primary value; Gateway side is compute optimization only. Documented as follow-up.

phase1_summary.subagent_1A_gateway: busy_timeout=30000 + _forge_accepted_monitor (10min loop, 1h TTL). Transitions stale accepted runs to 'interrupted' via shared forge_store writer. +43 LOC across forge_logging.py and main.py.
phase1_summary.subagent_1B_cold_anvil: sys.stdout.reconfigure(line_buffering=True) in pipeline/__init__.py + _cancel_active_cascade error logging with 1 retry in cascade.py. +45 LOC across __init__.py and cascade.py.
phase1_summary.pyright_fixes_after_subagents: Added type: ignore on reconfigure calls (TextIO stub doesn't expose it). Changed `data.get(...)` to `(data or {}).get(...)` in _attempt_cancel for None-safety. Pre-existing pyright issues in both repos left untouched.
phase1_summary.validation: Both repos py_compile clean. Cold_Anvil imports clean. Nohup smoke test confirmed stdout buffering fix (smoke 0/1 visible at 0.8s into 1.2s process).
phase1_summary.deploy: Gateway restarted via restart-gateway.sh. All self-tests pass, smoke test green, no startup errors.
phase1_summary.first_accepted_monitor_fire: Will fire at t+10min after Gateway boot (~21:18 UTC). Verified in-passing during Phase 2 sanity cascade journal scan.

cold_anvil_working_tree: DIRTY — pre-existing user changes to docs/ROADMAP.md, deleted tracked benchmark JSON files, untracked deploy scripts. NOT touched by commit 2bf705a (used explicit git add <file>).
findings_not_in_plan: RI-3 must update TWO format() call sites in forge_pipeline.py (2273 and 2612), not just one
RI-5 has FIVE completed_code storage sites in iterative.py (578, 588, 592, 665, 762) — best wiring is a _validate_and_store helper
_forge_stall_monitor is passive (only logs); my _forge_accepted_monitor goes further and transitions state (per spec). Noted in commit message.
waiting_for: user approval to proceed to Phase 2 (RI-5 tree-sitter)
